backend/main.mo: Actor exposes a deduplication function that removes repeated text lines using a Set and traps on empty input.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected frontend files, components, tests, and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of various frontend files including components, hooks, styles, and data.
frontend/index.css: Defines global OKLCH-based theme variables and Tailwind layers for light/dark comic styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx with the Spider-Verse title.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root component setting up theming, settings context, header/footer, controls, and the comic viewer.
frontend/src/components/ComicPanel.tsx: Styled container component for rendering comic panels with variant-based visual themes.
frontend/src/components/ComicParts.tsx: Collection of styled components for caption boxes, speech bubbles, thought bubbles, SFX text, and scene labels.
frontend/src/components/ComicViewer.tsx: Renders all structured panels, applies optional deduplication, and displays panel stats inside a scroll area.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer showing app copyright, caffeine.ai attribution, and Spider-Verse creator credits.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with app title, subtitle, and a theme toggle button.
frontend/src/components/RepetitionRemova: UI toggle allowing users to enable or disable deduplication of repeated panel text.
frontend/src/contexts/ComicSettingsConte: React context storing and updating the repetition-removal setting across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor based on the current identity and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, loading, login, and clearing identity using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a mutation hook that calls actor.deduplicateComicText and invalidates related queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind styles with comic-themed color variables, typography, and UI effects.
frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts: Contains structured comic panels from Spider‑Verse with captions, dialogue, scenes, and SFX.
frontend/src/lib/comicModel.ts: Defines the comic panel data model and utilities to extract text lines from panels.
frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts: Implements functions to deduplicate text lines and panel parts while preserving order.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides a helper to merge class names using clsx and tailwind‑merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry that initializes React, React Query, and the Internet Identity provider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration enabling plugins, theme extensions, and comic‑style design tokens.
project_state.json: JSON describing the comic-PDF project's state, architectural notes, and a list of features for enhancing layout, theming, structured panels, and text deduplication.
